title: Studio Shell
subtitle: single UI entry point
description: Shared browser shell for AI Studio surfaces: home, persistent navigation, collapse state, theme, and unified local serving. It hosts surfaces but does not own module domain logic.

children.title: README.md
children.description: Studio Shell module contract: owns the shared browser shell, defines surface vs module ownership, and lists hosted surfaces.

children.title: Home Surface
children.description: AI Studio home surface: opens the architecture map, taskboard, asset viewer, manual asset prep, quality checks, tree source, and validation report from one local URL.

children.title: server.mjs
children.description: Unified local server for AI Studio home, Architecture Map surface, Taskboard surface, Asset Viewer, Asset Tools, tree.json, validation report, and API routes.

children.title: start_site.mjs
children.description: Provides AI Studio site launch helper.

children.title: start_site.cmd
children.description: Small Windows wrapper for the Windows-safe AI Studio launcher.
children.role: Windows AI Studio site launch helper

children.title: start_site_windows.ps1
children.description: Provides Windows-safe AI Studio site launch helper.
children.role: Windows-safe AI Studio site launch helper

children.title: Canvas Chat
children.description: HTTP and lifecycle host for the Canvas-owned chat semantics and app-server adapter; physical co-location remains until T0352.

children.title: Shared UI Implementation
children.subtitle: css/js internals
children.description: Low-level browser files for the shared AI Studio shell. Hidden from the default graph so Studio Shell stays readable as one architectural surface.

children.title: home.css
children.description: AI Studio home-surface content styling. The shared navigation shell is owned by studio_shell.css and studio_shell.js.

children.title: studio_shell.css
children.description: Shared dark AI Studio app shell: persistent left navigation, collapsed navigation state, page content area, and responsive sidebar behavior.

children.title: studio_shell.js
children.description: Presents shared AI Studio shell behavior.
